name: microsoft-todo-mcp-server
description: Microsoft Todo MCP service for Claude and Cursor. Fork of @jhirono/todomcp
long_description: Manage Microsoft To Do task lists, tasks, and checklist items via the Microsoft Graph API. Optimized for Microsoft 365 work/school accounts. Personal Microsoft accounts have limited API access (MailboxNotEnabledForRESTAPI).

client_id.title: Azure App Client ID
client_id.description: Application (client) ID from your Azure App Registration

client_secret.title: Azure App Client Secret
client_secret.description: Secret value from Azure > Certificates & secrets

access_token.title: Initial Access Token
access_token.description: From tokens.json after running 'pnpm run auth'. Will be refreshed automatically once running.

refresh_token.title: Initial Refresh Token
refresh_token.description: From tokens.json after 'pnpm run auth'. Used by the server to renew the access token.
